review_title: Comprehensive benefits with concerns over operational balance and promotion fairness
review_body_text: I spent more than 10 years at Bank Islam and found the benefits to be quite comprehensive. The work culture is generally positive with supportive and fun colleagues, and the bank offers good flexibility through work-from-home arrangements for specific departments. However, there are significant challenges regarding work-life balance, particularly in operations where the workload is often overwhelming. Since 2021, the bonus payouts (averaging 2 months) have not felt commensurate with the level of effort required. Furthermore, the promotion structure appears to be heavily influenced by seniority and favoritism rather than clear meritocracy, which can be discouraging for high-performers. Additionally, top management often feels disconnected from ground-level operational reality. While it is a stable organization, the compensation-to-effort ratio and career progression transparency need improvement.
Working here you will have a flexible working hours, hybrid working (3 days office, 2 days WFH) depends on the department mostly Digital IT. Good place for learning.

review_title: Overall, it has been a valuable and rewarding experience that has strengthened my skills and understanding of the role.
review_body_text: What is the best part of working at the company? Managing 17 staff and Data center facility What is the most stressful part about working at the company? Managing Staff and arrangement of shift work What is the work environment and culture like at the company? flexible and relax environment What is a typical day like for you at the company? A typical day for me usually starts with reviewing priorities and any urgent items from emails or system alerts. I then focus on my core responsibilities handling assigned tasks, resolving issues, and supporting ongoing projects.

review_title: An All-rounder benefits kind of company. Work-life balance on top!
review_body_text: The best working place for intern. The allowance are great. All colleagues, team leaders and seniors are all great. The work-life balance here is to die for. One in a million.
Pros: staff mostly friendly. Good OT pay. Staff got a lot of AL Cons: Management. Messy SOP No career advancement Old equipment Hard to apply for AL even got alot of it
they really took a good care of their intern. computer provided allowance high and also have training to build intern knowledge to enter work enviroment

review_title: No Guidance, No Space, and No Credit
review_body_text: This review is for most positions under the Deposit Department: Poor management, no proper space to meet clients, and zero guidance. Had to self-learn everything. Toxic culture—colleagues fought over customers, and superiors claimed credit for our hard work and performance. Stressful job with little support or recognition. High targets, but performance not fairly recognised. The most enjoyable part was achieving targets through my own effort, despite the lack of support. It gave me a sense of personal accomplishment, even if it wasn’t recognised by management.
pros_text: Learn to work independently. Personal growth through self-initiative.
cons_text: Poor management and lack of guidance; No proper workspace for meeting clients; Toxic, competitive environment; Superiors claim credit for your work ; High targets, but performance not fairly recognised; No commission or very minimal rewards; Constant stress, unclear roles, and no team support

review_body_text: I had a great experience working at Bank Islam. The environment was collaborative and supportive, with a strong focus on both employee development and customer satisfaction. The leadership team was approachable, and there were many opportunities to grow and learn within the organization. I especially appreciated the structured training programs and the emphasis on teamwork, which helped me develop valuable skills in financial services and customer relations. Overall, Bank Islam is an excellent place to work if you’re looking for a dynamic, professional, and rewarding workplace

review_title: Best colleagues but bad upper management
review_body_text: Day to day work very easy, but need to be careful due to working with money after all. Bosses not supportive at all and keep pressure us without listen to our opinions.

Learning Experience: Gain a deep understanding of Islamic finance principles and practices. Professional Development: Opportunities for skill-building through workshops and mentorship. Networking: Connect with professionals in the banking industry, which can be beneficial for future career opportunities.

as we all grew older, the first impression of ourselves is important when dealing with our client. but somehow i found some of workers loves to overdressed and indifference dress etiquette, also give a bad impression to the company.
Pro: -Great staff benefit. -Pleasant environment. -Good for fresh graduate as a learning centre Cons: -salary not balance -no benefits for staff working for so long -favoritism

review_title: Good team, but salary to low at airport
review_body_text: Too many task appointed with very low salary. Company got a lot of profit every year, must increase salary & also the cost living there very high. .
The working environment is very positive, it is very inclusive and the colleagues are very supportive. People are friendly and easy to approach. Recommended to join!
OK, but not much career growth. Not much diversity as well. But workers are very nice and friendly, sometimes got trips such as hiking to Mount Kinabalu
good environment. Has been 1 year there. The environment is good but the basic is too low. The commission given is quite higher than another bank. Overall is okay
I've been work 12 years,and many benefits I got.Alhamdulillah..Nice working place and convenient.sporting colleague and friendly bosses. Really missed the calm and Islamic environment there
depending where u r being placed at, i happen to b at the worst place, the old timers basically have good work culture in bank islam, those who came from other banks can b a p**** in the a**

review_title: Fun workplace and colleague but no career development
review_body_text: Good environment but typical corporate politics. Hybrid work hours depending on department. Still imementing wfh. Hard to get promoted but good yearly bonus payout
It is a great workplace where all the colleagues and bosses are nice and friendly, it is just that work is a lot. You have to be resilient and just focus completing your work

review_title: Produtive and fun place to work
review_body_text: Only go to office once a week, can work at office or at home and very flexible working hours. Have friendly leaders and very supportive teammates that will help you throughout you working there.
good environment, friendly colleagues and manager. Everyone very helpful. Got present everytime for birthday. The hardest part is sometimes had to work on saturday and sunday.
The bank provides good, friendly, and helpful work culture. I am grateful that I have gotten a chance to work at bank islam. In conclusion, I've a great internship experience there.

review_title: Stable job, old-school technologies and people
review_body_text: Big corporate culture, awesome boss makes job more awesome, great job overall, only bad side is when working with cross-division is some personal attitudes.
pros_text: Very work life balance, Great team & division, Lots of perks and benefits
cons_text: Cross-division collaboration not so good, old-schooled techs & people hard to accept new tech and skeptical

review_title: A good place to start for your career growth
review_body_text: A good place to start your banking career but has been stagnant for a year ( doing the same task ). Jump to another bank for more opportunities. Management always meeting until late

I believe more benefit / higher basic should be offered to Temporary Officer / contract staff. The workload is quite high. Should improve the way to solve long queue issue at branches especially when it's time for students account opening, card replacement

Friendly and forgiving colleagues, get to learn a lot on Islamic culture and Islamic banking. Very good medical coverage and allowance. Processing new and existing application from customer. Product personal financing,vehicle financing,credit card
job_title: PERSONAL FINANCING EXECUTIVE (BASED AT BRANCH BIMB BANDAR WAWASAN)

review_body_text: 5 days working and I learned a lot on how to persuade customer and attract their interest. Meanwhile, the working environment is very comfortable even though there were some pressure from the customers.

review_title: Good banking company with a lot of benefits
review_body_text: Received a lot of benefits and comission and bonus from this company . Good colleageous , culture and work environment . Adventure, competitive and advance
I learned a lot admin, PA, taller, all the banking and recovery. Employers are considerate. Multitask job especially at the branch. Enviroment still have anelement of Islam.

formality work with comfortable ethically environment in office area, learning about interpersonal skills, documentation and well organized management. surrounding with healthy and friendly work culture along with high speed performance in need for marketing target and strong built relationship with co-workers
Good experiences. People who love to do sales are encourage to apply. An estaished islamic banks, first ever in malaysia and shariah compliance. Working with bank islam is a great experience

The team at the company are very helpful as they provide training to new employee. Moreover, the workplace culture is very enjoyable, where all of the staff are very friendly, regardless of their position.
Good job and have fun.You must have responsible about the job.Hardworking and be a good workers.You also have to alert the costomer.You must be patience.
Good culture, Good enviroment but the ceo at hq has too many political issue in bank.. But overall that was a nice place to work except for salary and condition to be permanent staff

It makes me feel working in banking environment with dealing with customer issues. The management is good and very balanced treat among workers. The hardest part of the job is to learn the black screen system to know further about customer details.

A family environment Everyone is friendly, Leadership is important People still respect each other Reaching the Branch KPI is a must Guiding the customer to the right way of doing their business with the bank When you're wrong they will tell you I'm just a SL1M that is now call as PROTEGE
cons_text: Don't have opportunity to work in the bank as a contract or permenant

review_body_text: All staff are very helpful in sharing opinions and experiences on giving guidelines to other staff. Every morning they will be doing some briefing in terms of performing well in the organization. They also will highlighted the mistake done yesterday and influencing staff to perform better.
Good job. just worked here after SPM and while waiting to continue studies. Good salary and normal working hours. friendly collegues and superior. overall its a good job to do

review_title: Friendly colleagues with a good environment.
review_body_text: Colleagues made myself comfortable when they usually taught me when I did not know how to settle my works. Other than doing the financing process, I learned how to handle walk-in customers. For example, I need to know all the forms on the front liner. My job was to assist customers on how to fill in the forms in the right way.

• work on sales and marketing basis to achieve monthly target set by management • must engage closely with customers as different financial background requires different financial needs • must adapt to competitive working culture as sales target must be met in order to earn commissions • commissions can go as high as you desire. The more sales you do, more commission you will get
- A good company that have the job security. - Company is giving good benefit either to contract or permanent staff - Normal working hour and Malaysia public holiday is entitle to all staff.

review_title: Fast pace and fun working experience.
review_body_text: 1. Gained experience in cash handling and performing banking transaction upon customer's request. 2. We have queue management system to monitor our timing for both serving and waiting time of our customers. 3. Being in the industry, we have to be fully conscious of current issues and regulations.
pros_text: Good healthcare benefits and high employer's EPF contribution.
cons_text: Limited system access per job title.

review_title: Productive and fun with dynamic environment
review_body_text: My position assigned me to make sales of banking products. Everyday, My team and I plan sales diary and apply it. Every morning I have to distribute flyers, sales call, open booth, talk, or any activities that lead to meet potential customer. I love to work in variety environment. I also love sport activities in my workplace. In my opinion, the best management must have good leadership to lead fresher and excellent work in a team. The hardest job, if I got any assignment from superior by not too clear objective of the job.

review_title: To manage customer waiting time, operation and atm
review_body_text: Double up effort to facilitate clients needs on banking issues. To ensure clients are well served with goods services and timely. Ensure all amount and figures are key in correctly and accordance to the banking system. Collect monies from the atm and ensure its overall balances.
The achievement of target should be praised and appreciate by the company. The benefit promised also needs to implement so that can increase the productivity.

review_title: Good environment and better place to work
review_body_text: I love worked in this company because i had a good friends and good boss. It is interesting place to work on.I've been worked here for 3 years and im happy with it.

review_title: Productive and fun workplace with management team
review_body_text: manage the day-to-day collections to ensure losses are minimised by the effective implementation of collections strategy. the hardest part is we have to give full commitment in terms of time. the environment of work is very good. the management always make an event to foster team spirit among employees.
best for marketing experience good for financial institution learning areas well being staffs and a good culture suitable for person who has sales driven
Good place to enhance interpersonal skills.Supportive top management always encourage to do better everyday. Energetic and fun team always make job easier than ever.

In 1 year experience in Banking Industries, i learned to have a great communication with public. For the 1st month i have been training at Bank Islam central in Kuala Lumpur. I been training how to process financing document. After that, i have to dedicated myself to find a sales target per days, week, monthly and also year. My job is to find a client for making a personal financing, housing financing and credit card. To find a client for making financing for this era is very adventure because of economics issues. I take this challenges and find a solution how to find client for my sales target. So many marketing planning that i have learned such as direct marketing for awareness, telemarketing communicate with client, follow up, closed client and finally marketing channel. I need to process documentation and proceed to HQ for approval.

review_title: A very good and nice play to work
review_body_text: to be honest im very enjoys working with bank islam base on the workplace culture and have teach me alot in customer services industry because when it become to work it not just about money also passion. our passion to work with that company.

5 working days a week. Numerous meetings to cover GL conciliation. Extensive exposure to regulatory projects ie Bank Negara Malaysia (Central Bank of Malaysia) Workplace culture can be improved Rapid changing banking environment ie GST implementation, PIN & PAY in credit card system Generous annual leave entitlement, provides many avenues for personal development.
pros_text: Comprehensive medical coverage for the employee & family members

review_body_text: Its an okay place to work for a start for those who doesn't have working experience yet but you got to learn about foreign currency, different cultures, remmitance services and also got to know how some part of bank work. in this case in Bureau de Change
always have on job training,team works,the hard works,aalways archieve the target monthly and yearly.after change new management ,all of senior has transfered to other location.
Working here is the best experience ever because it teach me on how to be work smart rather than work hard. The team are very supportive and willing to help each other.

this company put trust to every staff in completing task given. they guide very clearly so that i can minimum mistake. my hardest part is communicating with a problematic customer, but i successfully handle this situation. the most enjoyable part is when the top management always keep in touch with the their staff to make sure we do not have any problem in conducting task given.

Then in the afternoon I will be the clerk and at the evening I will in charge of the telemarketing. There is lots of thing s I learned here. As a result I can work under pressure, become multitasking person and also become fast learner. The management really considered on the benefit.
